<dd>System time</dd>
<dd>系统时间</dd>
<dd>A duration type to represent an approximate span of time</dd>
<dd>用于表示近似时间长度的时长类型</dd>
A service to periodically call Instant::update()
周期性地调用 Instant::update() 的服务
Alias for Duration.
Duration 的别名。
System time
系统时间
A duration type to represent an approximate span of time
用于表示近似时间长度的时长类型
A service to periodically call Instant::update()
周期性地调用 Instant::update() 的服务
Alias for Duration.
Duration 的别名。
A measurement of a monotonically increasing clock. Opaque and useful only with Duration.
单调递增时钟的测量值。 不透明，只能与 Duration 配合使用。
Resulting durations are actual durations; they do not get affected by clock adjustments, leap seconds, or similar. In order to get a measurement of the wall clock, use Date instead.
所得的时长是真实时长，不受时钟调整、 闰秒等影响。 若需获取挂钟时间，请改用 Date。
A crate to make time measurements that focuses on speed.
一个专注于测速的时间测量 crate。
This crate is a partial replacement for the Time and Duration structures from the standard library, with the following differences:
本 crate 部分替代标准库中的 Time 与 Duration 结构， 区别如下：

• Speed is privileged over accuracy. In particular, CLOCK_MONOTONIC_COARSE is used to retrieve the clock value on Linux systems, and transformations avoid operations that can be slow on non-Intel systems.
• 速度优先于精度。在 Linux 系统上， 特别使用 CLOCK_MONOTONIC_COARSE 获取时钟值，并且转换过程 避免在非 Intel 系统上可能较慢的操作。

• The number of system calls can be kept to a minimum. The “most recent timestamp” is always kept in memory. It can be read with just a load operation, and can be updated only as frequently as necessary.
• 系统调用次数可以保持在最低。最新时间戳始终缓存在内存中， 仅需一次加载操作即可读取，且仅在必要时更新。
coarsetime is available on crates.io and works on Rust stable, beta, and nightly.
coarsetime 可在 crates.io 上获取， 支持 Rust stable、beta 和 nightly 版本。
Windows and Unix-like systems are supported.
支持 Windows 与类 Unix 系统。
Returns the elapsed time since the UNIX epoch
返回自 UNIX 纪元以来经过的时间
Returns the elapsed time since the UNIX epoch, based on the latest explicit time update
基于最近一次显式时间更新，返回自 UNIX 纪元以来经过的时间

Updates the cached system time.

This function should be called frequently, for example in an event loop or using an Updater task.

更新缓存的系统时间。

应当频繁调用此函数，例如在事件循环中或使用 Updater 任务。
Sets the cached system time to the specified timestamp. This function is intended for testing purposes only. It should not be used in production code.
将缓存的系统时间设置为指定时间戳。 本函数仅供测试使用。 不应在生产代码中使用。
Creates a new Duration from the specified number of seconds and additional nanosecond precision
以指定的秒数与额外纳秒精度创建一个新的 Duration
Creates a new Duration from the specified number of days
以指定的天数创建一个新的 Duration
Creates a new Duration from the specified number of hours
以指定的小时数创建一个新的 Duration
Creates a new Duration from the specified number of minutes
以指定的分钟数创建一个新的 Duration
Creates a new Duration from the specified number of seconds
以指定的秒数创建一个新的 Duration
Creates a new Duration from the specified number of milliseconds
以指定的毫秒数创建一个新的 Duration
Returns the number of days represented by this duration
返回此时长所表示的天数
Returns the number of hours represented by this duration
返回此时长所表示的小时数
Returns the number of minutes represented by this duration
返回此时长所表示的分钟数
Returns the number of whole seconds represented by this duration
返回此时长所表示的完整秒数
Returns the number of whole milliseconds represented by this duration
返回此时长所表示的完整毫秒数
Returns the number of whole microseconds represented by this duration
返回此时长所表示的完整微秒数
Returns the number of whole nanoseconds represented by this duration
返回此时长所表示的完整纳秒数
Returns the nanosecond precision represented by this duration
返回此时长所表示的纳秒精度

Return this duration as a number of “ticks”.

Note that length of a ‘tick’ is not guaranteed to represent the same amount of time across different platforms, or from one version of coarsetime to another.

以“刻度数”形式返回此时长。

请注意，一个‘刻度’的长度并不保证在不同平台上， 或在不同 coarsetime 版本之间代表相同的时间长度。

Creates a new Duration from the specified number of “ticks”.

Note that length of a ‘tick’ is not guaranteed to represent the same amount of time across different platforms, or from one version of coarsetime to another.

以指定的“刻度数”创建一个新的 Duration。

请注意，一个‘刻度’的长度并不保证在不同平台上， 或在不同 coarsetime 版本之间代表相同的时间长度。
Returns the duration as a floating point number, representing the number of seconds
以浮点数形式返回此时长，表示的秒数
Returns the absolute difference between two Durations
返回两个 Duration 之间的绝对差
Add two durations, saturating on overflow
将两个时长相加，溢出时饱和
Add two durations, returning None on overflow
将两个时长相加，溢出时返回 None
Subtract two durations, saturating on underflow/overflow
将两个时长相减，溢出/下溢时饱和
Subtract two durations, returning None on underflow/overflow
将两个时长相减，溢出/下溢时返回 None
Multiply a duration by a scalar, saturating on overflow
将时长乘以一个标量，溢出时饱和
Multiply a duration by a scalar, returning None on overflow
将时长乘以一个标量，溢出时返回 None
Divide a duration by a scalar, returning None for division by zero
将时长除以一个标量，除以零时返回 None

Returns an instant corresponding to “now”

This function also updates the stored instant.

返回对应“现在”的时刻

此函数同时会更新已存储的时刻。

Returns an instant corresponding to “now” without updating the cached value. After this, recent() will still return the old instant.

now() is generally preferred over this function.

返回对应“现在”的时刻，且不更新缓存值。

调用后，recent() 仍会返回旧的时刻。

通常应优先使用 now() 而非此函数。
Returns an instant corresponding to the latest update
返回最近一次更新对应的时刻

Update the stored instant

This function should be called frequently, for example in an event loop or using an Updater task.

更新已存储的时刻

应当频繁调用此函数，例如在事件循环中或使用 Updater 任务。
Returns the amount of time elapsed from another instant to this one
返回从另一时刻到此刻所经过的时间长度
Returns the amount of time elapsed between the this instant was created and the latest update
返回从该时刻创建到最近一次更新之间所经过的时间长度

Returns the amount of time elapsed since this instant was created

This function also updates the stored instant.

返回自该时刻创建以来所经过的时间长度

此函数同时会更新已存储的时刻。

Return a representation of this instant as a number of “ticks”.

Note that length of a ‘tick’ is not guaranteed to represent the same amount of time across different platforms, or from one version of coarsetime to another.

Note also that the instant represented by “0” ticks is unspecified. It is not guaranteed to be the same time across different platforms, or from one version of coarsetime to another.

This API is mainly intended for applications that need to store the value of an Instant in an AtomicU64.

以“刻度数”形式返回该时刻的表示。

请注意，一个‘刻度’的长度并不保证在不同平台上， 或在不同 coarsetime 版本之间 代表相同的时间长度。

还需注意，由“0”刻度表示的时刻是未定义的， 并不保证在不同平台上或不同 coarsetime 版本之间 代表同一时间。

本 API 主要用于需要将 Instant 的值存储到 AtomicU64 中的场景。

Create an Instant from a number of “ticks”.

Note that length of a ‘tick’ is not guaranteed to represent the same amount of time across different platforms, or from one version of coarsetime to another.

Note also that the instant represented by “0” ticks is unspecified. It is not guaranteed to be the same time across different platforms, or from one version of coarsetime to another.

以指定的“刻度数”创建一个 Instant。

请注意，一个‘刻度’的长度并不保证在不同平台上， 或在不同 coarsetime 版本之间 代表相同的时间长度。

还需注意，由“0”刻度表示的时刻是未定义的， 并不保证在不同平台上或不同 coarsetime 版本之间 代表同一时间。
Calculate an Instant that is a Duration later, saturating on overflow
计算一个晚于当前 Instant 一个 Duration 的时刻，溢出时饱和
Calculate an Instant that is a Duration later, returning None on overflow
计算一个晚于当前 Instant 一个 Duration 的时刻，溢出时返回 None
Calculate an Instant that is a Duration earlier, saturating on underflow
计算一个早于当前 Instant 一个 Duration 的时刻，下溢时饱和
Calculate an Instant that is a Duration earlier, returning None on underflow
计算一个早于当前 Instant 一个 Duration 的时刻，下溢时返回 None
Spawns a background task to call Instant::update() periodically
派生一个后台任务，周期性地调用 Instant::update()
Stops the periodic updates
停止周期性更新
Creates a new Updater with the specified update period, in milliseconds.
以指定的更新周期（毫秒）创建一个新的 Updater。
